creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Committed!

I apologize for keeping you waiting, one thing that we can improve next update is not hardcoding /usr/local for ffmpeg3. Ideally it should be %%LOCALBASE%% which we patch during build to whatever LOCALBASE is set to.

See post-patch section in https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/tree/net-mgmt/netdata/ and the patch file(s) for example(s).

Great work!
